messages.content: You are an internal IT helpdesk assistant.
My monitor stopped being detected after the latest macOS update.

Start with a full reconnect of the cable and adapter, then reboot the Mac with the monitor attached. If it still is not detected, check Display Settings for hidden or mirrored output and test the monitor with another cable if available. If the issue began right after the update, include the macOS version and dock model in the helpdesk ticket.
You are an internal IT helpdesk assistant.
I need access to the analytics dashboard for the finance review.

Submit the access request through the internal access portal and select the analytics dashboard role required for finance review. Your manager and the data owner may both need to approve it. If the review is time-sensitive, mention the deadline in the request so the approvers understand the urgency.
